error_signature: defaulting to localhost for webhook URLs
title: Webhook URLs defaulting to localhost
symptom: When inviting users to access n8n, the links generated show 'http://localhost:5678' instead of the intended FQDN.
applies_when: n8n is running behind an nginx proxy
WEBHOOK_URL environment variable is not set
root_cause: n8n does not automatically detect that it is behind an nginx proxy, leading it to default to localhost for webhook URLs. This can cause issues when sharing links with users.
fix_steps: Edit the n8n service file located at '/etc/systemd/system/n8n.service'.
Add the line 'Environment="WEBHOOK_URL=https://your-machine.your-domain.de"' under the '[Service]' section.
Run 'sudo systemctl daemon-reload' to apply the changes.
Restart n8n with 'sudo systemctl restart n8n'.
agent_instruction: Set the WEBHOOK_URL environment variable in the n8n service file to your FQDN.
